scope: Deployment-side save and one-click apply for the selected battle plan
Desktop QA only; mobile/cellphone is outside the current target
flow: Verified 計画セット保存 and 戦線計画セット were visible.
Verified localStorage saveVersion 7, campaign saveVersion 7, and one plan set with 7 entries.
Changed selected brigade posture to 弾性防御.
Clicked 一括適用 for 戦線計画 1.
Verified selected brigade summary returned from 姿勢 弾性防御 to 姿勢 固守 with 通常射撃.
observations: Plan set description was 7旅団 / 5戦線 / 0指定予備。出撃配置で保存した一括戦線計画。
The 戦線計画セット panel showed 合致 7/7旅団 and enabled 一括適用.
A plan set stores frontline geometry, reserve doctrine, designated reserves, and all selected units' StandingOrders.
Applying a plan set updates the Deployment draft and deployment plan; individual per-brigade templates are not overwritten until the player explicitly saves them.
notes: Mobile QA was skipped because the current target excludes cellphone/mobile.
